source_concept: validated_instrument (Spitzer 2006); 7 items harmonized to 0-3 then summed

variables.name: gad7_item1
variables.description: GAD-7 item 1: Feeling nervous, anxious, or on edge (0-3, last 2 weeks)

fields.title: Recent feelings or nervousness or anxiety
Recent feelings or nervousness or anxiety

variables.rationale: Harmonize MHQ (enc 504, 1-4) and online (enc 168, 0-3) each to 0-3; take max across the equivalent items (highest available report).

variables.name: gad7_item2
variables.description: GAD-7 item 2: Not being able to stop or control worrying (0-3, last 2 weeks)

fields.title: Recent inability to stop or control worrying
Recent inability to stop or control worrying

variables.rationale: Harmonize MHQ (enc 504, 1-4) and online (enc 168, 0-3) each to 0-3; take max across the equivalent items (highest available report).

variables.name: gad7_item3
variables.description: GAD-7 item 3: Worrying too much about different things (0-3, last 2 weeks)

fields.title: Recent worrying too much about different things
Recent worrying too much about different things

variables.rationale: Harmonize MHQ (enc 504, 1-4) and online (enc 168, 0-3) each to 0-3; take max across the equivalent items (highest available report).

variables.name: gad7_item4
variables.description: GAD-7 item 4: Trouble relaxing (0-3, last 2 weeks)
variables.rationale: Harmonize MHQ (enc 504, 1-4) and online (enc 168, 0-3) each to 0-3; take max across the equivalent items (highest available report).

variables.name: gad7_item5
variables.description: GAD-7 item 5: Being so restless that it is hard to sit still (0-3, last 2 weeks)
variables.rationale: Harmonize MHQ (enc 504, 1-4) and online (enc 168, 0-3) each to 0-3; take max across the equivalent items (highest available report).

variables.name: gad7_item6
variables.description: GAD-7 item 6: Becoming easily annoyed or irritable (0-3, last 2 weeks)
variables.rationale: Harmonize MHQ (enc 504, 1-4) and online (enc 168, 0-3) each to 0-3; take max across the equivalent items (highest available report).

variables.name: gad7_item7
variables.description: GAD-7 item 7: Feeling afraid as if something awful might happen (0-3, last 2 weeks)
variables.rationale: Harmonize MHQ (enc 504, 1-4) and online (enc 168, 0-3) each to 0-3; take max across the equivalent items (highest available report).

variables.name: gad7_total
variables.description: GAD-7 total score (sum of the 7 items, range 0-21)
variables.rationale: Sum of the seven 0-3 item scores. A missing item is skipped (min_count=1).

variables.name: gad7_moderate_or_worse
variables.rationale: Standard GAD-7 cutoff: total >= 10 indicates clinically significant anxiety (Spitzer 2006).

dropped.title: Nervous feelings
dropped.reason: lifetime trait (touchscreen), not 2-week frequency; last-resort fallback only

dropped.title: Frequency of tenseness / restlessness in last 2 weeks
dropped.reason: related symptom, not the exact GAD-7 item; lower priority

dropped.title: Very nervous mood over last week
dropped.reason: different timeframe (last week) and scale; excluded for harmonization
